---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something that would make Manu more useful
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What is the idea?

Describe the feature or improvement you have in mind. Don't worry about being too technical. A clear description of what you would like to be able to do is the right starting point.

## What problem does this solve?

Tell me about the situation where this would help. The more I understand the context, your research workflow, institution, team setup, or a specific manuscript challenge, the better I can think through the right solution.

> Example: "When transcribing large manuscripts with multiple scribal hands, I need a way to..."

## How might it work?

If you have thoughts on how this could be implemented or what it might look like, share them here. Sketches, references to other tools, or even just a rough idea are all welcome. This is optional. Don't let it stop you from opening the issue.

## Who else would benefit?

Do you think other scholars, institutions, or teams would find this useful? Any sense of how common this need is helps me prioritise.

## Alternatives you have considered

Have you found any workarounds or other tools that partially solve this? Knowing what you have already tried helps me understand what is missing.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, references to comparable features in other IIIF viewers or annotation tools. Anything that helps me understand the full picture.
